translations.en: a stern, severe man in white robes.
translations.zh: 一位身著白袍、面色嚴峻的男子。

translations.en: You interrupt the man from his research.
translations.zh: 汝打斷了此人的研究工作。

translations.en: "Yes, yes, what is it?"
translations.zh: 「是，是，何事？」

translations.en: "You've come for healing, I suppose."
translations.zh: 「汝是來求醫的，吾猜。」

translations.en: He raises an eyebrow.
translations.zh: 他揚起一道眉毛。

translations.en: "You may not be my choice for dinner conversation, but none of you are dead."
translations.zh: 「汝等或許不是吾理想的席間談伴，但汝等無人已死。」

translations.en: "I am Dargoth, master of medical lore."
translations.zh: 「吾乃達高斯，醫術大師。」

translations.en: "My true calling is research."
translations.zh: 「吾真正的志業是研究。」

translations.en: "My studies here have advanced the healing art throughout the world!"
translations.zh: 「吾在此地的研究已令全世界的醫術更上一層樓！」

translations.en: "But, more often than not, I am called upon to @cure poison ivy and @heal paper cuts!"
translations.zh: 「然而吾卻三天兩頭被叫去@cure（治毒）藤皮疹或@heal（醫紙）割傷！」

translations.en: "I grow weary of such trifles!"
translations.zh: 「吾已厭倦這等瑣事！」

translations.en: "Stay out of trouble!"
translations.zh: 「切勿惹禍上身！」

translations.en: "I don't want to see my fine workmanship wasted!"
translations.zh: 「吾不希望看到吾的精湛醫術付諸流水！」

translations.en: "Well, what can I do for thee?"
translations.zh: 「好，吾能為汝效何勞？」

translations.en: "Come, come, get to the point. I'm a busy man!"
translations.zh: 「快說，直說重點。吾是大忙人！」

translations.en: "I can do nothing for those scars. Still, they look healed."
translations.zh: 「吾對那些傷疤無能為力。不過，看起來已痊癒了。」

translations.en: "Why do you waste my time? None of you are wounded!"
translations.zh: 「為何浪費吾的時間？汝等無人受傷！」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「汝等哪一位？」

translations.en: "$Y, your injury is most interesting!"
translations.zh: 「$Y，汝的傷甚是有趣！」

translations.en: "Ah! $Y, you have an injury worthy of my skill!"
translations.zh: 「啊！$Y，汝這傷勢方才配得上吾的醫術！」

translations.en: "It will cost you 30 gold for me to heal you, interested?"
translations.zh: 「吾為汝療傷需 30 枚金幣，汝有意嗎？」

translations.en: Laying hands upon $Y, Dargoth mends the wounds.
translations.zh: 達高斯按手於 $Y 身上，為其療癒傷口。

translations.en: "I need to be paid to heal you."
translations.zh: 「吾需先收費，方能為汝療傷。」

translations.en: "What else do you need?"
translations.zh: 「汝還需要什麼？」

translations.en: "You don't look good, but you're not poisoned."
translations.zh: 「汝看起來氣色不佳，但並未中毒。」

translations.en: "Why do you waste my time? None of you are poisoned!"
translations.zh: 「為何浪費吾的時間？汝等無人中毒！」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「汝等哪一位？」

translations.en: "Fascinating, $Y! I have read about such poison only in ancient books!"
translations.zh: 「妙極，$Y！吾僅在古籍中讀過此種毒素！」

translations.en: "I haven't gotten many cases like this since they invented swamp boots."
translations.zh: 「自從沼澤靴問世以來，吾已許久未見此類案例了。」
translations.note: 避 5C：許久 OK (許 Big5=A7 D7, 汝=A6 汝，許 trail=D7 not 5C)

translations.en: "It'll cost 10 gold to cure you, interested?"
translations.zh: 「為汝解毒需 10 枚金幣，汝有意嗎？」

translations.en: Laying hands upon $Y, Dargoth removes the poison.
translations.zh: 達高斯按手於 $Y 身上，為其驅除毒素。

translations.en: "If you can't pay, I can't cure you."
translations.zh: 「汝若付不起，吾便無法為汝解毒。」

translations.en: "Oh." Seeing the dead body that $Y carries, he becomes more polite.
translations.zh: 「哦。」見 $Y 所攜之遺體，他的態度頓時變得客氣了許多。

translations.en: "I am sorry you've lost a compatriot."
translations.zh: 「吾為汝失去一位同伴而感到遺憾。」

translations.en: "For 400 gold I can attempt resurrection, interested?"
translations.zh: 「吾可嘗試施行復活術，需 400 枚金幣，汝有意嗎？」

translations.en: "Resurrection is a difficult task. I'm sorry, but I need to be paid."
translations.zh: 「復活術難度極高。抱歉，吾必須先收費。」

translations.en: "That ain't enough money."
translations.zh: 「這金幣不夠多。」

translations.en: "You are #1 gold piece\s short."
translations.zh: 「汝短少 #1 枚金幣。」
translations.note: \s plural marker preserved in en; zh singular OK

translations.en: "Go see a gravedigger. I'll reckon his price'll be lower."
translations.zh: 「去找掘墓人吧。吾估計他的收費更便宜。」

translations.en: Your party takes up a collection for their fallen comrade.
translations.zh: 汝的隊伍為倒下的同伴募集金幣。

translations.en: Dargoth lays hands upon the corpse...
translations.zh: 達高斯將手按在遺體上……

translations.en: "Doman..."
"thixus..."
translations.zh: 「提薩斯……」

translations.en: "anretu!"
translations.zh: 「安瑞圖！」

translations.en: And the dead live again!
translations.zh: 死者復生！

translations.en: "I see that $Y carries another slain friend."
translations.zh: 「吾見 $Y 又帶來了另一位陣亡的友人。」

translator_notes: 達高斯是位技術高超卻脾氣不好的醫者，語氣直接、帶點輕蔑但有職業自尊。復活術咒語（Doman/thixus/anretu）依發音音譯。
